meaning: vt.增加,添加,计算...总和,补充说,又说;vi.加,加起来,增添,做加法
examples: Add up all the money I owe you.
If your soil is very acidic, add lime.
Add more water until the dough is workable.
Nevertheless, the various pieces don't make sense together, and yet they still add up.
"Tesco invests to help build brands where we believe we can add value, " says a spokesman.
